Meeting notes from November 15, 2025, attendees: Sarah, Marcus, Priya, Jake, and the assistant.
Sarah announced that the board approved the Q1 2026 budget for Project Alpha.
Marcus raised a concern about the database migration timeline. He estimated it would take 3 weeks.
Priya demonstrated the new React component library she built. The team agreed to adopt it.
Jake reported that the Kubernetes cluster migration is 80% complete. Expected done by end of November.
Action item: Marcus will prepare a detailed migration plan by November 22.
Action item: Priya will document the component library API by December 1.
The team decided to postpone the mobile app until Q2 2026 to focus on the web platform.
Next meeting scheduled for November 22, 2025 at the same time.
